title: Starmer to face final PMQs as Burnham nears Labour leadership finish line – UK politics live
summary_full: Starmer will face questions from Kemi Badenoch at his final PMQs as prime minister Tell us: what do you want from the next Labour leader and UK prime minister?Labour should ditch the triple-lock pensions promise to help tackle the UK’s straitened public finances, the Organisation for Economic Cooperation and Development has urged. Heather Stewart has the story.I’m afraid we are not going to be able to open comments today for staffing reasons. If you want to contact me directly, it is probably best to get me on on Bluesky at @andrewsparrowgdn.bsky.social. Continue reading...
